name: git-forge
description: Read-only pull-request viewer for Gitea, GitHub, and GitLab — list PRs, read details, view diffs, read top-level comments. Pick your forge in Configure; the adapter dispatches per request. PR creation and merge happen through the Claude session, not the panel.

configSchema.label: Forge
configSchema.description: Which hosted git forge to query. Each forge has its own API shape — the adapter dispatches per request.

configSchema.label: Server URL
configSchema.description: Forge API root. For public GitHub use https://api.github.com (or https://github.com — the adapter coerces). GitLab / Gitea / GHE pass through verbatim.

configSchema.label: Repository
configSchema.description: owner/name format (GitLab also accepts group/sub/name). The adapter URL-encodes for GitLab.

configSchema.label: API Token
configSchema.description: Personal access token with read access to pull requests. Leave empty for public repos on GitHub. Stored encrypted via the plugin secret cap (AES-GCM).

configSchema.label: Default State Filter
configSchema.description: Which PR state the list view loads first. Override per-query in the UI.

configSchema.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
configSchema.description: Cap on each forge HTTP call so a slow / unreachable forge can't hang the gateway.
